Provides an rtt typekit for ROS control_msgs messages.

    It allows you to use ROS messages transparently in
    RTT components and applications.

    This package was automatically generated by the
    create_rtt_msgs generator and should not be manually
    modified.

    See the http://ros.org/wiki/control_msgs documentation
    for the documentation of the ROS messages in this
    typekit.

    create_rtt_msgs generator and should not be manually
    modified.

    for the documentation of the ROS messages in this
    typekit.

The package provides implementation of several 2D laser-based simultaneous
    localization and mapping (SLAM) algorithms (tinySLAM, vinySLAM, GMapping)
    created with the SLAM constructor framework. The framework provides common
    SLAM components that may help to develop custom SLAM algorithms and can be
    accessed by provided links.

name: smacha
description: SMACHA (short for "State Machine Assembler", pronounced "smasha") aims at distilling the task-level simplicity of SMACH into compact YAML-based scripts in the foreground, while retaining all of its power and flexibility in Jinja2-based templates and a custom code generation engine in the background.

name: smacha_ros
description: SMACHA ROS is a package that provides ROS integration for SMACHA. Its main component is a SMACHA server that allows for templates to be loaded from disparate packages and accessed from anywhere within the ROS network and provides services for each of the main SMACHA functions.

name: wire
description:
The wire meta package is implements a framework that 
     generates and maintains one consistent world state estimate based 
     on object detections. It solves the data association problem by 
     maintaining multiple hypotheses and facilitates tracking of various
     object attributes. The state estimators used for estimation and the
     probabilistic models used for association can be configured.

name: xbot_safety_controller
description:
A controller ensuring the safe operation of Xbot.

    The SafetyController keeps track of bumper, cliff and wheel drop events. In case of the first two,
    Xbot is commanded to move back. In the latter case, Xbot is stopped.
    
    This controller can be enabled/disabled.
    The safety states (bumper pressed etc.) can be reset. WARNING: Dangerous!

name: resource_retriever
description:
This package retrieves data from url-format files such as http://,
   ftp://, package:// file://, etc., and loads the data into memory.
   The package:// url for ros packages is translated into a local
   file:// url.  The resourse retriever was initially designed to load
   mesh files into memory, but it can be used for any type of
   data. The resource retriever is based on the the libcurl library.

Messages for interfacing with various computer vision pipelines, such as

description: The entry point package for the ament buildsystem in CMake.

name: ament_cmake_auto
description: The auto-magic functions for ease to use of the ament buildsystem in CMake.

name: ament_cmake_core
description:
The core of the ament buildsystem in CMake.

    Several subcomponents provide specific funtionalities:
    * environment: provide prefix-level setup files
    * environment_hooks: provide package-level setup files and environment hooks
    * index: store information in an index and retrieve them without crawling
    * package_templates: templates from the ament_package Python package
    * symlink_install: use symlinks for CMake install commands

name: image_geometry
description:
`image_geometry` contains C++ and Python libraries for interpreting images
    geometrically. It interfaces the calibration parameters in sensor_msgs/CameraInfo
    messages with OpenCV functions such as image rectification, much as cv_bridge
    interfaces ROS sensor_msgs/Image with OpenCV data types.

name: laser_geometry
description:
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by
    sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud
    or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account
    for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.
authors: Dave Hershberger Tully Foote Radu Bogdan Rusu

name: pluginlib
description:
The pluginlib package provides tools for writing and dynamically loading plugins using the ROS build infrastructure.
    To work, these tools require plugin providers to register their plugins in the package.xml of their package.
authors: Eitan Marder-Eppstein Tully Foote Dirk Thomas Mirza Shah

name: cv_bridge
description:
This contains CvBridge, which converts between ROS2
    Image messages and OpenCV images.

name: image_geometry
description:
`image_geometry` contains C++ and Python libraries for interpreting images
    geometrically. It interfaces the calibration parameters in sensor_msgs/CameraInfo
    messages with OpenCV functions such as image rectification, much as cv_bridge
    interfaces ROS sensor_msgs/Image with OpenCV data types.

name: opencv_tests
description: OpenCV tests for the Python and C++ implementations of CvBridge with Image message in ROS2.

name: vision_opencv
description: Packages for interfacing ROS2 with OpenCV, a library of programming functions for real time computer vision.
authors: Patrick Mihelich James Bowman Vincent Rabaud

name: libcurl_vendor
description: Wrapper around libcurl, it provides a fixed CMake module and an ExternalProject build of it.

name: resource_retriever
description:
This package retrieves data from url-format files such as http://,
   ftp://, package:// file://, etc., and loads the data into memory.
   The package:// url for ros packages is translated into a local
   file:// url.  The resourse retriever was initially designed to load
   mesh files into memory, but it can be used for any type of
   data. The resource retriever is based on the the libcurl library.

name: sophus
description: C++ implementation of Lie Groups using Eigen.

name: map_msgs
description: This package defines messages commonly used in mapping packages.
maintainers: David V. Lu!! Michael Ferguson William Woodall

name: move_base_msgs
description: Holds the action description and relevant messages for the move_base package.
authors: Eitan Marder-Eppstein contradict <AT> gmail.com David V. Lu!! Michael Ferguson

description: The entry point package for the ament buildsystem in CMake.

name: ament_cmake_auto
description: The auto-magic functions for ease to use of the ament buildsystem in CMake.

name: ament_cmake_core
description:
The core of the ament buildsystem in CMake.

    Several subcomponents provide specific funtionalities:
    * environment: provide prefix-level setup files
    * environment_hooks: provide package-level setup files and environment hooks
    * index: store information in an index and retrieve them without crawling
    * package_templates: templates from the ament_package Python package
    * symlink_install: use symlinks for CMake install commands

name: camera_calibration_parsers
description: camera_calibration_parsers contains routines for reading and writing camera calibration parameters.

name: camera_info_manager
description:
This package provides a C++ interface for camera calibration
     information.  It provides CameraInfo, and handles SetCameraInfo
     service requests, saving and restoring the camera calibration
     data.

name: image_common
description: Common code for working with images in ROS.

name: image_transport
description:
image_transport should always be used to subscribe to and publish images. It provides transparent
     support for transporting images in low-bandwidth compressed formats. Examples (provided by separate
     plugin packages) include JPEG/PNG compression and Theora streaming video.

name: polled_camera
description:
polled_camera contains a service and C++ helper classes for implementing a polled
     camera driver node and requesting images from it. The package is currently for
     internal use as the API is still under development.

name: camera_calibration
description:
camera_calibration allows easy calibration of monocular or stereo
     cameras using a checkerboard calibration target.
maintainers: Vincent Rabaud Steven Macenski Autonomoustuff team

name: depth_image_proc
description:
Contains components for processing depth images such as those
     produced by OpenNI camera. Functions include creating disparity
     images and point clouds, as well as registering (reprojecting)
     a depth image into another camera frame.
maintainers: Vincent Rabaud Steven Macenski Autonomoustuff team Chris Ye

name: image_pipeline
description: image_pipeline fills the gap between getting raw images from a camera driver and higher-level vision processing.
maintainers: Vincent Rabaud Steven Macenski Autonomoustuff team

name: image_proc
description: Single image rectification and color processing.
maintainers: Vincent Rabaud Steven Macenski Autonomoustuff team
authors: Patrick Mihelich Kurt Konolige Jeremy Leibs

name: image_publisher
maintainers: Vincent Rabaud Steven Macenski Autonomoustuff team Chris Ye

name: image_rotate
maintainers: Vincent Rabaud Steven Macenski Autonomoustuff team

name: image_view
description:
A simple viewer for ROS image topics. Includes a specialized viewer
  for stereo + disparity images.
maintainers: Vincent Rabaud Steven Macenski Autonomoustuff team

name: stereo_image_proc
description: Stereo and single image rectification and disparity processing.
maintainers: Vincent Rabaud Steven Macenski Autonomoustuff team
authors: Patrick Mihelich Kurt Konolige Jeremy Leibs

name: compressed_depth_image_transport
description:
Compressed_depth_image_transport provides a plugin to image_transport for transparently sending
    depth images (raw, floating-point) using PNG compression.

name: compressed_image_transport
description:
Compressed_image_transport provides a plugin to image_transport for transparently sending images
    encoded as JPEG or PNG.

name: image_transport_plugins
description:
A set of plugins for publishing and subscribing to sensor_msgs/Image topics
    in representations other than raw pixel data. For example, for viewing a
    stream of images off-robot, a video codec will give much lower bandwidth
    and latency. For low frame rate tranport of high-definition images, you
    might prefer sending them as JPEG or PNG-compressed form.

name: theora_image_transport
description:
Theora_image_transport provides a plugin to image_transport for
    transparently sending an image stream encoded with the Theora codec.

name: laser_assembler
description: Provides nodes to assemble point clouds from either LaserScan or PointCloud messages

name: laser_geometry
description:
This package contains a class for converting from a 2D laser scan as defined by
    sensor_msgs/LaserScan into a point cloud as defined by sensor_msgs/PointCloud
    or sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. In particular, it contains functionality to account
    for the skew resulting from moving robots or tilting laser scanners.
authors: Dave Hershberger Tully Foote Radu Bogdan Rusu

name: nmea_msgs
description: The nmea_msgs package contains messages related to data in the NMEA format.

name: nmea_navsat_driver
description:
Package to parse NMEA strings and publish a very simple GPS message. Does not
        require or use the GPSD deamon.

name: pcl_conversions
description: Provides conversions from PCL data types and ROS message types

name: pcl_ros
description:
PCL (Point Cloud Library) ROS interface stack. PCL-ROS is the preferred
  bridge for 3D applications involving n-D Point Clouds and 3D geometry
  processing in ROS.
authors: Open Perception Julius Kammerl William Woodall

name: perception_pcl
description:
PCL (Point Cloud Library) ROS interface stack. PCL-ROS is the preferred
  bridge for 3D applications involving n-D Point Clouds and 3D geometry
  processing in ROS.
authors: Open Perception William Woodall Julius Kammerl

name: pluginlib
description:
The pluginlib package provides tools for writing and dynamically loading plugins using the ROS build infrastructure.
    To work, these tools require plugin providers to register their plugins in the package.xml of their package.
authors: Eitan Marder-Eppstein Tully Foote Dirk Thomas Mirza Shah

name: qt_dotgraph
description: qt_dotgraph provides helpers to work with dot graphs.

name: qt_gui
description:
qt_gui provides the infrastructure for an integrated graphical user interface based on Qt.
    It is extensible with Python- and C++-based plugins (implemented in separate packages) which can contribute arbitrary widgets.
    It requires either PyQt or PySide bindings.

name: qt_gui_app
description: qt_gui_app provides the main to start an instance of the integrated graphical user interface provided by qt_gui.

name: qt_gui_core
description: Integration of the ROS package system and ROS-specific plugins for a Qt-based GUI.

name: qt_gui_cpp
description:
qt_gui_cpp provides the foundation for C++-bindings for qt_gui and creates bindings for every generator available.
    At least one specific binding must be available in order to use C++-plugins.

name: qt_gui_py_common
description: qt_gui_py_common provides common functionality for GUI plugins written in Python.

name: rqt
description: rqt is a Qt-based framework for GUI development for ROS. It consists of three parts/metapackages
authors: Dirk Thomas Dorian Scholz Aaron Blasdel

name: rqt_gui
description: rqt_gui provides the main to start an instance of the ROS integrated graphical user interface provided by qt_gui.

name: rqt_gui_cpp
description: rqt_gui_cpp enables GUI plugins to use the C++ client library for ROS.

name: rqt_gui_py
description: rqt_gui_py enables GUI plugins to use the Python client library for ROS.

name: rqt_py_common
description:
rqt_py_common provides common functionality for rqt plugins written in Python.
    Despite no plugin is provided, this package is part of the rqt_common_plugins
    repository to keep refactoring generic functionality from these common plugins
    into this package as easy as possible.

    Functionality included in this package should cover generic ROS concepts and
    should not introduce any special dependencies beside "ros_base".

name: velodyne
description: Basic ROS support for the Velodyne 3D LIDARs.

name: velodyne_driver
description: ROS device driver for Velodyne 3D LIDARs.
authors: Jack O'Quin Patrick Beeson Michael Quinlan Yaxin Liu

name: velodyne_laserscan
description: Extract a single ring of a Velodyne PointCloud2 and publish it as a LaserScan message

name: velodyne_msgs
description: ROS message definitions for Velodyne 3D LIDARs.

name: velodyne_pointcloud
description: Point cloud conversions for Velodyne 3D LIDARs.
authors: Jack O'Quin Piyush Khandelwal Jesse Vera

name: cv_bridge
description:
This contains CvBridge, which converts between ROS2
    Image messages and OpenCV images.

name: image_geometry
description:
`image_geometry` contains C++ and Python libraries for interpreting images
    geometrically. It interfaces the calibration parameters in sensor_msgs/CameraInfo
    messages with OpenCV functions such as image rectification, much as cv_bridge
    interfaces ROS sensor_msgs/Image with OpenCV data types.

name: opencv_tests
description: OpenCV tests for the Python and C++ implementations of CvBridge with Image message in ROS2.

name: vision_opencv
description: Packages for interfacing ROS2 with OpenCV, a library of programming functions for real time computer vision.
authors: Patrick Mihelich James Bowman Vincent Rabaud

name: interactive_marker_tutorials
description: The interactive_marker_tutorials package

name: librviz_tutorial
description: Tutorial showing how to compile your own C++ program with RViz displays and features.

name: rviz_plugin_tutorials
description: Tutorials showing how to write plugins for RViz.

name: rviz_python_tutorial
description: Tutorials showing how to call into rviz internals from python scripts.

name: visualization_marker_tutorials
description: The visulalization_marker_tutorials package

name: visualization_tutorials
description: Metapackage referencing tutorials related to rviz and visualization.
authors: Dave Hershberger David Gossow Josh Faust

name: xacro
description:
Xacro (XML Macros)
    Xacro is an XML macro language. With xacro, you can construct shorter and more readable XML files by using macros that expand to larger XML expressions.
authors: Stuart Glaser William Woodall Robert Haschke

name: librealsense2
description: Library for capturing data from the Intel(R) RealSense(TM) SR300 and D400 cameras. This effort was initiated to better support researchers, creative coders, and app developers in domains such as robotics, virtual reality, and the internet of things. Several often-requested features of RealSense(TM); devices are implemented in this project, including multi-camera capture.
authors: Sergey Dorodnicov Mark Horn Reagan Lopez Itay Carpis

name: libcurl_vendor
description: Wrapper around libcurl, it provides a fixed CMake module and an ExternalProject build of it.

name: resource_retriever
description:
This package retrieves data from url-format files such as http://,
   ftp://, package:// file://, etc., and loads the data into memory.
   The package:// url for ros packages is translated into a local
   file:// url.  The resourse retriever was initially designed to load
   mesh files into memory, but it can be used for any type of
   data. The resource retriever is based on the the libcurl library.

name: rqt_action
description:
rqt_action provides a feature to introspect all available ROS
  action types. By utilizing rqt_msg, the output format is
  unified with it and rqt_srv. Note that the actions shown on this plugin
  is the ones that are stored on your machine, not on the ROS core your rqt
  instance connects to.
maintainers: Mikael Arguedas Aaron Blasdel Geoffrey Biggs

name: rqt_bag
description: rqt_bag provides a GUI plugin for displaying and replaying ROS bag files.
maintainers: Dirk Thomas Aaron Blasdel Austin Hendrix

name: rqt_bag_plugins
description: rqt_bag provides a GUI plugin for displaying and replaying ROS bag files.
maintainers: Dirk Thomas Aaron Blasdel Austin Hendrix

name: rqt_console
description: rqt_console provides a GUI plugin for displaying and filtering ROS messages.

name: rqt_graph
description:
rqt_graph provides a GUI plugin for visualizing the ROS
      computation graph.

name: rqt_image_view
description: rqt_image_view provides a GUI plugin for displaying images using image_transport.

name: rqt_logger_level
description: rqt_logger_level provides a GUI plugin for configuring the logger level of ROS nodes.

name: rqt_msg
description:
A Python GUI plugin for introspecting available ROS message types.
  Note that the msgs available through this plugin is the ones that are stored
  on your machine, not on the ROS core your rqt instance connects to.
maintainers: Dirk Thomas Aaron Blasdel Michael Lautman

name: rqt_plot
description: rqt_plot provides a GUI plugin visualizing numeric values in a 2D plot using different plotting backends.
maintainers: Dirk Thomas Dorian Scholz Austin Hendrix

name: rqt_publisher
description: rqt_publisher provides a GUI plugin for publishing arbitrary messages with fixed or computed field values.

name: rqt_py_console
description: rqt_py_console is a Python GUI plugin providing an interactive Python console.

name: rqt_service_caller
description: rqt_service_caller provides a GUI plugin for calling arbitrary services.
maintainers: Dirk Thomas Mike Lautman Dorian Scholz

name: rqt_shell
description: rqt_shell is a Python GUI plugin providing an interactive shell.

name: rqt_srv
description:
A Python GUI plugin for introspecting available ROS message types.
  Note that the srvs available through this plugin is the ones that are stored
  on your machine, not on the ROS core your rqt instance connects to.
maintainers: Dirk Thomas Aaron Blasdel Michael Lautman

name: rqt_top
description: RQT plugin for monitoring ROS processes.

name: rqt_topic
description: rqt_topic provides a GUI plugin for displaying debug information about ROS topics including publishers, subscribers, publishing rate, and ROS Messages.

name: sophus
description: C++ implementation of Lie Groups using Eigen.

name: map_msgs
description: This package defines messages commonly used in mapping packages.
maintainers: David V. Lu!! Michael Ferguson William Woodall

name: move_base_msgs
description: Holds the action description and relevant messages for the move_base package.
authors: Eitan Marder-Eppstein contradict <AT> gmail.com David V. Lu!! Michael Ferguson

name: ml_classifiers
description: ml_classifiers

name: ament_cmake
description: The entry point package for the ament buildsystem in CMake.

name: ament_cmake_auto
description: The auto-magic functions for ease to use of the ament buildsystem in CMake.

name: ament_cmake_core
description:
The core of the ament buildsystem in CMake.

    Several subcomponents provide specific funtionalities:
    * environment: provide prefix-level setup files
    * environment_hooks: provide package-level setup files and environment hooks
    * index: store information in an index and retrieve them without crawling
    * package_templates: templates from the ament_package Python package
    * symlink_install: use symlinks for CMake install commands

name: ament_cmake_export_definitions
description: The ability to export definitions to downstream packages in the ament buildsystem.

name: ament_cmake_export_dependencies
description: The ability to export dependencies to downstream packages in the ament buildsystem in CMake.

name: ament_cmake_export_include_directories
description: The ability to export include directories to downstream packages in the ament buildsystem in CMake.

name: ament_cmake_export_interfaces
description: The ability to export interfaces to downstream packages in the ament buildsystem in CMake.

name: ament_cmake_export_libraries
description: The ability to export libraries to downstream packages in the ament buildsystem in CMake.

name: ament_cmake_export_link_flags
description: The ability to export link flags to downstream packages in the ament buildsystem.

name: ament_cmake_gmock
description: The ability to add Google mock-based tests in the ament buildsystem in CMake.

name: ament_cmake_gtest
description: The ability to add gtest-based tests in the ament buildsystem in CMake.

name: ament_cmake_include_directories
description: The functionality to order include directories according to a chain of prefixes in the ament buildsystem in CMake.

name: ament_cmake_libraries
description: The functionality to deduplicate libraries in the ament buildsystem in CMake.

name: ament_cmake_nose
description: The ability to add nose-based tests in the ament buildsystem in CMake.

name: ament_cmake_pytest
description: The ability to run Python tests using pytest in the ament buildsystem in CMake.

name: ament_cmake_python
description: The ability to use Python in the ament buildsystem in CMake.

name: ament_cmake_target_dependencies
description: The ability to add definitions, include directories and libraries of a package to a target in the ament buildsystem in CMake.
